# plural_workbench_webhook (Resource)

Workbench webhook resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name of this webhook trigger within a workbench.
- `workbench_id` (String) ID of the workbench this webhook belongs to.

### Optional

- `issue_webhook_id` (String) Issue webhook ID that sends events to this trigger.
- `matches` (Attributes) Webhook payload matching rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--matches))
- `prompt` (String) Prompt to run when this webhook trigger matches.
- `webhook_id` (String) Observability webhook ID that sends events to this trigger.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Internal identifier of this workbench webhook.

<a id="nestedatt--matches"></a>
### Nested Schema for `matches`

Optional:

- `case_insensitive` (Boolean) Whether matching should be case-insensitive.
- `regex` (String) Regex expression to match webhook payloads.
- `substring` (String) Substring expression to match webhook payloads.
